notes: Layer-2 acceptance click-through for the frontend remediation. EVERYTHING below is behavior-preserving code movement EXCEPT the 5 T4 items (E1-E5), which deliberately change the error path. So: for the decomposition items (D*), you're confirming the screen still renders + key interactions work (no blank screen, no console crash). For the error items (E*), you're confirming a FAILURE shows a message instead of crashing. Effects/emails/data writes are fine to trigger per the owner (already covered). Code gates already pass: tsc -b 0, production build 0, harness 6/6, 0 files >800.

items.title: T4 agents — Agent Insights error path
items.precondition: Admin logged in; an org with agent outputs.
steps: 1. Open Admin → Agent Insights (AgentInsights).
2. Confirm insights load.
3. Approve and reject an insight — confirm the success toast and the row updates.
4. (Failure path) With DevTools Network set to Offline, trigger a load/approve — confirm an error message/banner appears and the page does NOT crash.
items.expected: Success actions work as before; on a failed call an error is shown (not a blank screen or unhandled crash).

items.title: T4 clarity — Clarity dashboard error path
items.precondition: Client/admin with a location that has Clarity data.
steps: 1. Open the surface that shows Clarity metrics (selected location with Clarity).
2. Confirm sessions/bounce/dead-clicks/trend render.
3. (Failure path) Offline, reselect the location to force a refetch — confirm a Clarity error message appears, no crash.
items.expected: Clarity data renders on success; a fetch failure shows the error text, app stays usable.

items.title: T4 google-auth — Connect Google button error path
items.precondition: A surface with the Google connect button (settings / integrations).
steps: 1. Click 'Connect Google' — confirm the OAuth popup opens (cancel it; do NOT complete a real publish).
2. (Failure path) Offline, click connect — confirm 'Failed to start Google connection' / error message shows and the button resets (not stuck loading).
items.expected: Popup opens on success; on failure an error shows and the button is not stuck in loading.

items.title: T4 gbp — GBP data/accounts/locations error path
steps: 1. Open the GBP metrics surface; confirm reviews/rating/calls render and account/location pickers populate.
2. (Failure path) Offline, refetch — confirm GBP error text shows for data, accounts, and locations; no crash.
items.expected: GBP data + account/location lists render on success; failures show errors, app stays usable.

items.title: T4 onboarding — app startup + onboarding flow (HIGHEST RISK)
items.precondition: Test with BOTH an onboarded user and a not-yet-onboarded user.
steps: 1. Log in as an onboarded user — confirm you land in the app (NOT kicked to onboarding).
2. Log in as a new user — confirm the onboarding flow shows; complete a step (save profile, select GBP, complete) — confirm each works.
3. Run the product-tour wizard (start / skip / complete / restart).

4. CRITICAL failure path: as an ONBOARDED user, set Network to Offline and hard-reload the app once. Confirm you are NOT downgraded into the onboarding flow (the no-downgrade guard). Then go back online and reload — confirm normal.
items.expected: Onboarded users stay in-app even if the startup status call fails; new users see onboarding; wizard + save actions work; no crash on failure.
items.notes: This is the one change that touches app-load behavior. Test the offline-reload-as-onboarded-user case specifically.

items.title: Identity editor (IdentityModal 3422→781 + 5 child views)
steps: 1. Open the Identity modal.
2. Cycle every state/tab: empty/warm-up form, warming-up view, ready view, identity list tab, locations tab.
3. Edit a field, add/remove a location, toggle the JSON editor — confirm all render and save.
items.expected: All identity tabs/views render and behave exactly as before; edits save.

items.title: Website Detail page (2442→799) + tabs/header/modals
steps: 1. Confirm header (org dropdown, domain pill, action icons) renders.
2. Click through all 13 tabs.
3. Open each modal (Identity, Layout inputs, Create page, Find/replace, Connect domain).
4. Confirm loading/error/not-found states (e.g., bad id).
items.expected: Header, every tab, and every modal render and work as before.

items.title: Page Editor (2127→279) + body/modals/states
items.precondition: Admin → a website page → open the editor.
steps: 1. Confirm the editor loads (artifact/seo/code/visual views + sidebar).
2. Make an inline edit, an AI edit, undo/redo, save.
3. Open version history; preview + restore a version.
4. Open each modal; confirm loading/error/version-preview banners.
items.expected: Editor loads and all edit/save/version/modals behave identically.
items.notes: Heavy state core was lifted into usePageEditor/usePageEditorActions — exercise undo/redo + save + version restore especially.

items.title: Practice Ranking page (2498→649) + usePracticeRanking
steps: 1. Confirm batches/jobs/month-groups render.
2. Expand a batch; open a job's results view.
3. Use the filter dropdowns; trigger a ranking run/retry (per owner — effects ok).
items.expected: Rankings list, results view, filters, and run/retry behave as before.

items.title: DFY Website page (1869→535) + useDfyWebsite editor core
steps: 1. Confirm the editor loads (toolbar, iframe, sidebar) + the preparing/read-only/empty states.
2. Select an element, edit text, save.
3. Switch tabs (dashboard/website views), connect-domain header.
items.expected: DFY editor loads and select/edit/save + tab switching work identically.
items.notes: Whole editor state machine lifted into useDfyWebsite + useDfyWebsiteEditor — exercise element-select + text-edit + save.

items.title: PMS screens (ManualEntry 2208→482, VisualPillars 1512→619, AutomationCards, LatestJobEditor, DataViewer)
items.precondition: Admin/client with PMS data + the PMS manual-entry/automation surfaces.
steps: 1. Open PMS Visual Pillars — confirm it loads (data, automation status, polling).
2. Open the Manual Entry modal — paste/upload data, switch month tabs, edit rows, submit.
3. Open PMS Automation Cards (admin) — filters, approve toggle, edit a job's response.
4. Open the Latest Job editor + Data viewer.
items.expected: All PMS surfaces render and the manual-entry pipeline (paste/upload/rows/submit) + automation actions behave as before.
items.notes: ManualEntry had its whole 24-state core (incl. TDZ refs + paste handler) lifted into usePmsManualEntry hooks — exercise paste → preview → submit carefully.

items.title: Rankings Dashboard (1968→620) + Referral Engine Dashboard (981→786)
items.precondition: Client dashboard with ranking + referral data.
steps: 1. Open the rankings dashboard — confirm health gauge, factor breakdown, search-position, gaps, next-moves render.
2. Open the referral engine dashboard — metric cards, table, loading/error states.
items.expected: Both dashboards render all panels identically.

items.title: Website-builder tabs (PostsTab 1321→478, MenusTab 1010→706, PostBlocksTab, SeoPanel)
items.precondition: Admin → a website → Posts / Menus / Post-blocks tabs.
steps: 1. Posts tab: list, open editor, media picker, SEO panel, custom fields, save a post.
2. Menus tab: sidebar, menu form, item add/edit, drag-reorder, post picker.
3. Post-blocks tab: device switcher + preview.
items.expected: Posts/Menus/Post-blocks tabs + the SEO panel render and CRUD/drag/preview work as before.

items.title: Template Detail (1521→663) + children
steps: 1. Confirm header actions, layouts tab (Monaco), pages list, settings tab, live preview (desktop/mobile/SEO) render.
2. Edit + save a layout; add/rename/delete a page; use settings actions.
items.expected: Template detail tabs, preview, and page/layout actions behave as before.

items.title: Minds (MindSettingsTab 962→641, SkillDetailPanel 988→637, AiCommandTab 1375→694)
steps: 1. Mind settings tab: sources, work-pipeline config, credentials — render + edit.
2. Skill detail panel: analytics tab + configuration tab — render + save config.
3. AI Command tab: recommendations list, batch badges, target selection, additional notes.
items.expected: All minds surfaces render and edits/saves work as before.

items.title: Leadgen (FormSubmissionsTab 1176→745, LeadgenSubmissionDetail 1002→343)
steps: 1. Submissions list renders; filter tabs work; mark-all-read.
2. Open a submission detail — sections/flat view, file values, event timeline, audit payload, status chip.
items.expected: Submissions list + detail (timeline, files, audit) render as before.

items.title: Org admin (OrgSettingsSection 916→696, ActionItemsHub 1218→749)
steps: 1. Org settings section: render, business-data detail modal, refresh actions.
2. Action items hub: task list, approval switch, animated/filter dropdowns, task card → details.
items.expected: Org settings + action items render and actions work as before.

items.title: List/detail pages (WebsitesList, ImportsList, ImportDetail, AgentOutputsList, TasksView)
steps: 1. Open Websites list, Imports list, Agent Outputs list, Tasks view — confirm rows/filters/relative-times render.
2. Open an Import detail — version cards, copy URL, activate/deprecate/delete (per owner).
items.expected: All list pages + import detail render and row actions work as before.

items.title: Competitor onboarding (LocationCompetitorOnboarding 1746→599) + Create Page modal (1100→754)
items.precondition: Admin/client competitor-onboarding flow; a website for create-page.
steps: 1. Competitor onboarding: discovering stage, curating stage, the Leaflet map (pins/radius control), refresh-suggestions modal.
2. Create Page modal: wizard steps + template-mode fields render and submit.
items.expected: Competitor map/curation flow + create-page wizard render and behave as before.

items.title: Shared UI primitives (DesignSystem 1096→16 barrel) + folder-nesting (T5) imports
items.precondition: Any admin pages that use shared cards/badges/headers/bars.
steps: 1. Spot-check 3-4 admin pages that use DesignSystem components (MetricCard, StatusPill, headers, FilterBar, TabBar, EmptyState) — confirm they render normally.
2. Confirm no admin route 404s / blank-screens after the components/Admin folder reorganization (T5).
items.expected: Shared UI components render everywhere; no broken admin route from the folder moves.
items.notes: DesignSystem split into a barrel + the entire flat Admin/ folder was reorganized into feature subfolders — this item catches any missed import.

items.title: Onboarding wizard config + Step 1 (wizardConfig split, Step1_PracticeInfo)
steps: 1. Run the onboarding wizard — confirm steps + demo data render.
2. Step 1 practice info: fill + domain check + continue.
items.expected: Wizard steps and Step 1 render and proceed as before.
